prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年最低位次分别约5534名→4176名→5570名→3749名，波动剧烈，近4年最大振幅约1821名；2024年基准约3749名。本省理科计划2021–2023年均为4人，2024年增至5人；2026年物理类计划6人，较2024年扩招1人（+20%），扩招幅度较大，竞争有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第45名，近年排名稳定在第42–47名区间，学校综合实力处于全国前列；声誉文件未收录该校显著舆情事件，整体声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第54位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等偏上，对报考热度有一定正面影响；兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、作物学A、水产A、食品科学与工程A，共5个A 类学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 食品科学与工程类（对应A级学科）社会热度平稳；动物科学（对应A+学科）热度一般；工商管 理类社会热度分化观望。本省2026年考生总数约48000人（含不确定标记），按历史物理类占比约63.9%估算，物理类考生约30672人，较2025年物理类30457人基本持平，竞争格局 稳定；华中农业大学位于湖北武汉，在青海省招生计划极少（4–6人），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年 基准位次3749名、2026年计划扩招20%（缓解竞争）、本省物理类考生基本持平、抖音热度中等偏上（小幅推高热度）及软科排名小幅上升（提升吸引力），在扩招主导下预计位 次小幅后移（更易进）；预测最低位次约3880名，区间3380–4380名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 动物科学（国家卓越农林人才计划）
- 食品科学与工程类
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（包含机械设计制造及其自动化、机械电子工程、自动化、机器人工程）
- 大数据管理与应用
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（包含市场营销、人力资源管理、会计学、财务管理、工商管理）
- 公共管理类（包含土地资源管理、行政管理）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3380–4380名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<3380名）可重点冲刺动物科学（畜牧学A+）和食品 科学与工程类（食品科学A）等优势学科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings were approximately 5534 → 4176 → 5570 → 3749, with significant fluctuations; the maximum amplitude in the past 4 years is about 1821 places; the 2024 baseline is approximately 3749. The provincial science enrollment plan was 4 students from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 5 in 2024; the 2026 physics category plan is 6 students, an increase of 1 student (+20%) compared to 2024, a relatively large expansion, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 45th, with stable rankings in the 42–47 range in recent years, indicating the university's comprehensive strength is at the forefront nationally; the reputation file does not include significant public opinion events for this university, overall reputation is stable; Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively hot), short video platform attention is moderately high, having a certain positive impact on application popularity; Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, a total of 5 A-level disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Food Science and Engineering (corresponding to A-level discipline) has stable social popularity; Animal Science (corresponding to A+ discipline) has average popularity; Business Administration categories have divided and cautious social popularity. The total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 48,000 (including uncertain markers), estimated based on historical physics category proportion of about 63.9%, physics category examinees are about 30,672, basically unchanged from 30,457 in 2025, with a stable competitive landscape; Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with very few enrollment spots in Qinghai Province (4–6 students), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2024 baseline ranking of 3749, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 20% (easing competition), the provincial physics category examinee count basically unchanged, moderately high Douyin popularity (slightly boosting popularity), and a slight rise in Soft Science ranking (increasing attractiveness), under the dominant factor of expansion, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward (easier to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is about 3880, with a range of 3380–4380.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Animal Science (National Outstanding Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program)
- Food Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Categories (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering, Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Big Data Management and Application
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration Categories (including Marketing, Human Resource Management, Accounting, Financial Management, Business Administration)
- Public Administration Categories (including Land Resource Management, Administrative Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3380–4380, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3380), you can focus on aiming for advantageous discipline majors such as Animal Science (Animal Science A+) and Food Science and Engineering (Food Science A).
